Container.Name: unraid-icon-manager
Container.Overview: Manage Unraid Docker and Compose icons through SSH/SFTP. Local library icons are stored in a mapped icon directory and written as Unraid host paths.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent config and icon library data

Config.Name: Icon Files
Config.Description: Local icon files copied from the library. Set WebUI Unraid icon path to this host path.

Config.Name: Icon Store Dir
Config.Description: Container path used to store selected local icon files

Config.Name: Secret
Config.Description: Long random string used to encrypt saved credentials
